conversation.text: Do you support hologram video calling? We saw it at a trade show.

Hologram video calling is not a feature listed in our current CINNOX documentation. I want to make sure you have accurate information — this is not something I can confirm we offer. It's possible there was a mix-up at the trade show. Source: EN_CINNOX_Feature_List_v2026.
Are you sure? We specifically saw the CINNOX name on the booth.

I understand the confusion, but I can only confirm what's in our official feature documentation, and hologram video calling is not listed there. I would not want to mislead you. If you'd like, I can connect you with our team to investigate what you saw — but I cannot confirm this as a CINNOX feature.
What video features do you actually support?

CINNOX supports 1-to-1 video calling, screen sharing, and conference video calls. You can also record video calls directly within the platform. Source: CINNOX Documentation — Video Calling, CINNOX Feature List 2026.
